creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to, what I believe is, the original implementation, that code is really duplicated: https://github.com/Juniper/virtfs/blob/jnpr/virtfs/sys/dev/virtio/9pfs/virtfs_vnops.c#L97

I'll create a PR on Github today if nobody pushes a fix first.

Michael, did you have the chance to test the fix?
